title: default after H1 auto-enter goal_autopilot
purpose: A5.3 defines default after h1 auto enter goal autopilot for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified.
scope: Owns `A5.3` only; siblings under `A5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §3 — Branch A — Pursuit & control plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#3-branch-a-pursuit-control-plane).
behavior_steps: When H1 plan approval clears `hitl.pending` and Resolved Q&A records the approval, goal-keeper sets `autopilot.active` and populates goal fields from [A1](A1-index.md) in the same dual-write turn—no separate manual start-pursuit command.

The conductor immediately runs [A2.1](A2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) preflight and, if READY, enters [A3.2](A3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) goal autopilot in the same session when operator policy allows.
This default encodes 100% automation between touchpoints: intent is supplied once at H1, then pursuit runs until H2, verify stop, resource stop, or H3 per [A4](A4-index.md).
Strict HITL packs or debug single-step mode may opt out—`autopilot.active` stays false and [A5.1](A5.1-continue-resume-pursuit-if-not-blocked.md) drives one phase per Continue instead.
If goal fields are incomplete after H1, preflight fails closed at H2 rather than entering goal autopilot with ambiguous success_criteria or missing goal_verify_command.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
goal_verify passes but H3 rejected â€” goal.state returns to pursuing with rejection notes.
Edge case `A5.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `A5.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Add `goal` block to state template and journal-keeper dual-write (v2.14).
Implement `scripts/goal-verify.py` stub aggregating task evidence paths.
Document `A5.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `A5.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: A5.3 defines default after h1 auto enter goal autopilot for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified. In practice, the system when h1 plan approval clears `hitl.pending` and resolved q&a records the approval, goal-keeper sets `autopilot.active` and populates goal fields from [a1](a1-index.md) in the same dual-write turn—no separate manual start-pursuit command, then the conductor immediately runs [a2.1](a2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) preflight and, if ready, enters [a3.2](a3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) goal autopilot in the same session when operator policy allows.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-a 2026-06-28 -->

After H1 approves a plan, the default transition is automatic entry into goal autopilot—no manual “start pursuit” step. The goal-keeper skill (or equivalent conductor path) sets `autopilot.active`, populates goal fields from A1, and runs the first preflight in the same session when possible.

This default encodes “100% automation between touchpoints”: the operator supplies intent once, then observes until H2 or H3. Opt-out remains for strict HITL packs or debugging single steps. Pair with [A3.2](A3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) for the run mode entered here.
